name: Haunted Property
short_description: A new life begins in a low-cost apartment. Strange occurrences at night and the suspicious behavior of neighbors gradually push the protagonist to the edge.
detailed_description:
心霊物件 | Haunted Property is a Japanese psychological horror game.

Story

A new life begins in a low-cost apartment.
Strange occurrences at night and the suspicious behavior of neighbors gradually push the protagonist to the edge.

Game Features

・Mainly a first person walking simulator.
・VHS effects (can be turned off in settings)
・Two endings

About the distribution of the game

Welcome. No prior notice is required.
If you would like, we would appreciate it if you could include this store page URL in the summary section of the distribution page, etc.
